overall.description: A cinematic sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking along a wet highway at dusk. The scene features an elevated concrete overpass with red neon underlighting, Japanese signage, and distant mountains. A vehicle passes early in the clip as the character approaches the camera, passes by, and continues down the road.

events.description: black vehicle passes by on the left traveling in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the highway shoulder toward the approaching character

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera along the road shoulder, wearing dark clothing and a red cap

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure with distinctive red lighting underneath
large illuminated billboard with Japanese text and red/blue neon colors
dark silhouette of mountains against the twilight sky
low-rise building with illuminated windows and green signage
silver metal safety barrier running along the right side of the road
dark wet pavement reflecting the red lights from the overpass
dark-colored car with red taillights moving away from the camera

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet highway at dusk, with an elevated concrete overpass glowing with red lights overhead. A black vehicle passes by on the left while a pedestrian approaches from the distance. The neon billboard and mountain silhouette define the background against the darkening sky.

events.description: pedestrian passes the camera position and continues walking in the same direction

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the approaching character passes by closely

notable_agents.action: passing directly by the camera, revealing a red cap and light-colored pants before turning away

segments.scene_description: The pedestrian approaches rapidly, filling the frame as they pass the camera's position. The vehicle has moved out of view, leaving the focus on the character passing by. The wet road continues to reflect the ambient neon lighting from the overpass above.

events.description: green street sign reading 'San Amaro' becomes clearly visible on the right side

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the road as the passed character recedes into the distance ahead

notable_agents.action: walking away from the camera down the road, gradually becoming smaller in the distance

entered.detail: green rectangular street sign with white text reading 'San Amaro'
tall pole with traffic signals extending over the road

segments.scene_description: The character now walks away from the camera down the highway, growing smaller in the distance. A green 'San Amaro' street sign becomes visible on the right, along with traffic infrastructure. The overpass and neon billboard remain prominent in the background as the scene continues into the twilight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked highway at dusk that shifts from a wide environmental view to an intimate encounter before receding back into the twilight landscape. It begins with a view of an elevated concrete overpass glowing with red neon lights, as a black vehicle speeds past while a lone pedestrian approaches from the distance against a silhouette of mountains. As the pedestrian draws closer, they rapidly fill the frame and pass the camera's position, leaving the wet road to reflect the ambient neon glow in their wake. The scene then shifts focus to the character's retreating figure as they walk away down the highway, growing smaller in the distance. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal a green San Amaro street sign and traffic infrastructure on the right, while the overpass and neon billboards remain prominent under the darkening sky.
